body.title: Merge hardware_detect into SystemProxy as static inventory
body.result: 1ad216f6 — SystemProxy.hardware property, register_self populates real values. 3 tests.
body.description: hardware_detect.py becomes SystemProxy.hardware — one-shot inventory at boot (OS, CPU model, RAM total, GPU, hostname, IP, Ollama model). Separate from live metrics (CPU%, mem%). register_self() reads from SystemProxy instead of calling detect_hardware() directly.
